allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''./api/audits/auditRecords.controler.js''\).then\(async \(module\) => { try { const data = await module.getAuditRecordsData\(\); if \(data && data.content && data.content.length > 0\) { for \(const record of data.content\) { const startDateField = record.fields.find\(f => f.id === ''N63gUboL''\); if \(startDateField && startDateField.values && startDateField.values.length > 0\) { console.log\(''=== Audit Start Date Field ===''\); console.log\(''Record:'', record.name\); console.log\(''Field:'', JSON.stringify\(startDateField, null, 2\)\); console.log\(''''\); console.log\(''=== Record Due Date ===''\); console.log\(''recordDueDate:'', record.dates.recordDueDate\); console.log\(''dueDate:'', record.dates.dueDate\); break; } } } } catch \(error\) { console.error\(''Error:'', error.message\); } }\).catch\(err => console.error\(''Import error:'', err\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./api/audits/auditRecords.controler.js''\).then\(async \(module\) => { try { const data = await module.getAuditRecordsData\(''CcYPrN6Z''\); console.log\(''=== AUDIT RECORD CcYPrN6Z ===''\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data, null, 2\)\); } catch \(error\) { console.error\(''Error:'', error.message\); } }\).catch\(err => console.error\(''Import error:'', err\)\);")
